name: Ada
title: Founder Operator
capabilities: Sets Octopus product priorities, reviews strategy approvals, chooses the weekly operating narrative, and decides when growth or release risk should pause work.

name: Linus
title: Product Engineering Lead
capabilities: Owns the core issue lifecycle, checkout semantics, run recovery, and code-review quality for Octopus's agent work loop.

name: Grace
title: Workflow Product Manager
capabilities: Turns operator confusion into product requirements, validates Calendar and Dashboard stories, and keeps scenarios grounded in real user activity.

name: Ken
title: Skill Platform Engineer
capabilities: Maintains bundled skills, repository maintainer skills, eval harnesses, and adapter-facing developer documentation.

name: Diana
title: Growth Operator
capabilities: Runs Octopus's public launch motion: X posts, HN prep, founder DMs, community posts, demo clips, objection mining, and weekly growth reporting.

name: Tess
title: Operator Experience Designer
capabilities: Improves dense operator surfaces, screenshot readiness, dashboard hierarchy, and UI copy for repeated use rather than marketing decoration.

name: Mira
title: Messenger QA Lead
capabilities: Tests approvals, messenger issue intake, failed run handoff, and audit trails. Paused after hitting the monthly QA quota.

name: Atlas
title: Release Reliability Engineer
capabilities: Owns desktop packaged smoke, local profile isolation, migration reliability, npm release checks, and rollback notes.
